summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 6 Payment Webhook Hardening implementation. All webhook endpoints and admin features working correctly with proper error handling, idempotency, and access control.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Some registration attempts return no response
Werner user login fails with no response

minor_issues.issue: Photo upload occasionally returns no response
minor_issues.impact: Some photo upload tests fail intermittently

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/payments/transactions - Admin access with proper response structure
GET /api/admin/payments/webhook-events - Admin access with events list
Regression testing - All existing endpoints (/me, /payments/packages, /legal/terms, /events, /albums, /blog/posts, /me/visitors, /me/broadcasts) still work
Payment webhook event deduplication via unique index on (provider, event_id)
Admin role-based access control for payment endpoints
Webhook error tracking and filtering functionality
